title: Tomcat_Port
text: Tomcat_Port Specifies the port number on which the Apache Tomcat web server listens for HTTP requests. Tomcat_Port = PortNumber For example: tomcat_port=8086 Default value: First available port starting with 8080 File section: [install] Description The default Uniface installation installs an Apache Tomcat Web Server as part of the Uniface test environment. Related Links Apache Tomcat Apache Tomcat is an open-source Java EE (Enterprise Edition)-compliant web server which is included in the Uniface installation. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
